name: WaterChemistryQualityReportPipeline
label: Water Chemistry Quality Validation and Reporting
description: Runs three sequential stages in one component: physicochemical quality validation of unit-transformed water chemistry data, generation of the validation PDF and Excel review files, and selection/aggregation of the final dataset for ICP reporting. The three scientific scripts remain separate and are coordinated internally.

parameters.name: param_ionsdiff_low_k
parameters.label: Ion balance limit — low conductivity (µS/cm <= 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed absolute ion-balance difference for samples with WeightedConductivity <= 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_ionsdiff_high_k
parameters.label: Ion balance limit — high conductivity (µS/cm > 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed absolute ion-balance difference for samples with WeightedConductivity > 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_low_1
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — very low conductivity (µS/cm <= 10)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed conductivity difference for samples with WeightedConductivity <= 10 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_low_2
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — low conductivity (µS/cm 10–20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed conductivity difference for samples with WeightedConductivity between 10 and 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_high
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — high conductivity (µS/cm > 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed conductivity difference for samples with WeightedConductivity > 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_ratio_nacl_low
parameters.label: Na/Cl ratio lower bound
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable Na/Cl ratio on a µeq/l basis.

parameters.name: param_ratio_nacl_high
parameters.label: Na/Cl ratio upper bound
parameters.description: Maximum acceptable Na/Cl ratio on a µeq/l basis.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Unit-transformed water chemistry data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP produced by the combined preprocessing component (steps 2–4), containing tab-separated site/subprogram CSV files with mg/l, µg/l and µeq/l representations.

inputs.name: input-samples
inputs.label: Samples information file
inputs.description: Excel file used by all three internal stages. It must include SampleID and should include SamplingTypology; ICP_Program, Instrument, ID_PostgreSQL, SiteCode and SiteName are used when available.

outputs.name: output-alldata
outputs.label: Merged allData ZIP
outputs.description: One merged pre-validation CSV per SiteCode.

outputs.name: output-validated
outputs.label: Chemically validated data ZIP
outputs.description: One validated CSV per SiteCode with chemical quality indicators and FINAL_VALIDATION.

outputs.name: output-pdf
outputs.label: Validation report PDF
outputs.description: Multi-page PDF summary and detailed validation report.

outputs.name: output-repeat
outputs.label: Samples to repeat
outputs.description: Samples whose final validation result is NO.

outputs.name: output-all
outputs.label: All validated data
outputs.description: All samples and validation results used as the internal input to the final-selection stage.

outputs.name: output-final
outputs.label: Final report data
outputs.description: Selected and monthly aggregated data ready for ICP reporting and database ingestion.

outputs.name: pipeline-log
outputs.label: Pipeline execution log
outputs.description: Execution messages grouped by the three internal stages.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
